title: selaginella palu-palu
intro: Selaginella palu-palu is a type of plant species, also known as 'palu-palu fern', which belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Selaginella palu-palu include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
